remixRunSummary.strategySummary: Selected a document-to-action workflow transfer from a source-product pattern to the school notice theme.
risksForConceptStrategist: Preserve source evidence and uncertainty; do not present generated actions as official instructions.

evaluatedRemixes.whatWasTransferred: Dense document to guided action cards with provenance.
evaluatedRemixes.whatWasChanged: The specialist workflow is moved to a household-facing notice-reading moment.
evaluatedRemixes.whyThisMayWork: Families need immediate actions, confirmations, and source references from long notices.
evaluatedRemixes.broadAudienceHook: Paste a notice and see what to do today.
evaluatedRemixes.aiNativeHook: Extraction, uncertainty preservation, and family-context routing are visible in one screen.
evaluatedRemixes.antiCloneBoundary: Transfer the workflow structure only; do not copy the source product UI or claims.
iterationNotes: Use as Findy Block A chain-check candidate.
